description: ANALYST re-proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 pending AUDITOR disposition. The prior TASK_PROPOSED (event_id TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001-PROPOSED-0002) has not yet received an AUDITOR decision. ANALYST asserts the smoke report satisfies autonomous loop integrity criteria. AUDITOR must independently inspect governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and all referenced workflow files on main branch, then issue either VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED (closing this task and advancing to the next roadmap phase) or VERIFICATION_FAILED (with documented deficiencies requiring remediation). No further ANALYST action is possible until AUDITOR issues its decision. Proof target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch with pass status for all five checks.
